summary: Plan-only classification: #74070 remains the live canonical issue for the ACP background-task terminalSummary/progressSummary bug. #74103 is already closed unmerged and should not receive any closure action; its useful contribution remains evidence for the canonical issue and any future credited fix path.

actions.reason: #74070 is the only open surviving item and still tracks the unresolved root cause after the direct PR was closed unmerged.
Already closed PRs must not receive close actions. Keep #74103 closed as historical contributor evidence while #74070 remains the canonical tracking issue.
